title: lathyrus niger f. latifolius
intro: Lathyrus niger f. latifolius, also known as the broad-leaved vetchling or broad-leaved lathyrus, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the pea family, Fabaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues, due to its expectorant properties. Lathyrus niger f. latifolius is often prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and can be used externally for skin conditions and wounds.
